session.user: Run `make fast-ci` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report them.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci make target for linting and testing

session.tool_result:

make: *** [Makefile:97: fast-ci] Error 1
session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command failed with exit code 1 due to a Prettier formatting issue. Here's the summary:
## Fast CI Results
**Status: FAILED** (Exit code 1)
### Issues Found:
**Prettier Formatting Issue:** - Code style issues found in 5 files that need formatting: - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/cli/command-organization.md` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/cli/erk-exec-commands.md` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/erk/pr-address-workflows.md` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
### All Other Checks Passed:
- **Lint**: All checks passed - **Format Check**: 1678 files already formatted - **Markdown Check**: Passed - **Exec Reference Check**: OK - **Type Checking (ty)**: All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5832 passed in 23.20s - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed in 4.71s - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed in 0.88s - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: 24 passed (test run completed)
The pipeline failed at the Prettier formatting step before completing all tests, but unit tests show no failures.
